text.tspan: If Component Enuemrator is not available, the following loop will be process only once,
and assumed target is a Host Device.
For each component, perform every step in sequence.
All steps must be completed successfully before continue with the next component.
For each step, perform both 'install' and 'apply' task
to ensure that an Update is installed and applied onto
current component, before move on to the next one.
Note: a device or DU Agent restart request can be encoded
Note: a device or DU Agent restart request can be encoded
Since 'apply' task was completed as part of 'install' above,
